name: LazySkills
description: Portable agent skills by Lachlan Chen for AgInTiFlow, Codex, Claude, Gemini, GitHub Copilot, and compatible local-tool agents.

skills.description: Prepare, generate, monitor, download, and publish LALACHAN Xiaoyunque videos through the logged-in browser UI with evidence checks.

Critique and repair LALACHAN/RaraXia/AyaChan/SasaKun story drafts, dialogue, and Xiaoyunque prompts so they read naturally, avoid AI-like language, and keep props, causality, duration, and character voices clear.

Run multi-round LALACHAN story critique and rewrite cycles, including 10-round polish with Codex exec gpt-5.5 xhigh, to improve clarity, causality, shareability, natural Chinese dialogue, and Xiaoyunque readiness.
Publish LazyEdit and LALACHAN/RARACHAN videos through LazyEdit, AutoPubMonitor, AutoPublish, and platform queues.

Analyze songs with Musia, extract stems, lyrics, beats, and chords, adapt lyrics for target languages, prepare same-music singing localization artifacts, and fix Fun Lazying Art per-vocal lyric timing.

Generate, correct, review, publish, and hand off original Musia songs, including ACE-Step full-song projects, vocal QA, correction passes, Fun Lazying Art website publishing, per-vocal lyric sets, and LALACHAN song-first video workflows.

Prepare, audit, fix, document, and publish Fun Lazying Art website media items for Musia with ASR-corrected lyrics, multilingual lyric JSON, timing, covers, manifests, validation, and player recording.

Create song-first LALACHAN/Xiaoyunque MV handoffs from reviewed Musia songs, including full-song story MVs, chorus or climax cuts, upload-label prompts, song-locked audio replacement, and LazyEdit-ready outputs.
Prepare, publish, and verify npm packages, including token-safe local auth, 2FA, trusted publishing, provenance, and install smoke tests.

Publish a local git repository to GitHub from Codex or AgInTi, including profile-style multilingual README generation, LazyingArt banner/support panels, sponsors, CITATION.cff, remote creation, push, homepage, description, and topics.
Transcribe audio or video into timestamped Markdown with optional WhisperX diarization, then produce neutral Markdown, LaTeX, and PDF reports without leaking private source context.

Replace or cover one or more detected video faces with supplied or generated image assets, including multi-person animal masks with stable identity tracking, keyed-background removal, alpha compositing, and audio-preserving output.
Transcribe a video, derive topic-based section boundaries from the transcript, and split a source or edited video into named clips with a manifest.
Correct scanned/OCR and technical books into page-aware Markdown, booklike TeX, and validated PDFs while preserving figures, equations, tables, diagrams, captions, and TOC structure.

Open LibGen book search/detail pages through Chrome/CDP while blocking Trip.com and ad redirects, select candidates by exact metadata and PDF > EPUB > other format preference, and report safe detail-page evidence.
Build LinguaLeaf/PocketPolyglot multilingual interlinear books with JSON chunks, ruby/pinyin/furigana, grammar roles, and bidirectional PDFs.
Coordinate multiple agent sessions across machines, repos, tools, and runtimes using safe handoff packets, peer identity maps, private session mirrors, status probes, and action contracts.
Run guarded WeChat chatops for LabCanvas and AgInTi through an isolated Linux GUI, direct DB monitor, fast router, worker queue, media sync, and private send targets.

Operate and maintain the AMD Kria KV260 Prophesee Metavision lab, including PetaLinux desktop launchers, custom event viewer, recording API, native viewer recovery, Windows X11 control center, and file-transfer GUI.

Coordinate KV260 Prophesee event recording with the Windows host and USB Arduino light controller, including LAN identity, COM-port checks, recording API use, repo context, and cross-session handoff memory.
Install and use KiCad with MCP/agent automation to inspect existing PCB projects, generate or edit boards, save component datasets, validate DRC, export Gerbers/STEP, and render board previews.
Prepare, check, submit, and document guarded JLCPCB/JiaLiChuang PCB orders from Gerber ZIPs through China, global, and assistant workflows without leaking private data or paying automatically.
Prepare, check, submit-to-payment, document, and troubleshoot Wenext / 未来工场 3D-print orders from STL, STP, or STEP files with guarded checkout boundaries.
Install, activate, launch, and wire JLCEDA/LCEDA Pro with MCP bridge automation, including local Electron CDP launch, jlc-bridge extension setup, gateway checks, and MCP validation.
Calibrate and control a dual LED Arduino/MOS/INA219 setup with inverse-LUT constant-power crossfades, telemetry capture, and flicker reduction.

Design, revise, validate, document, and render mechanical CAD parts with OpenSCAD, CadQuery/build123d/OCP, FreeCAD, Blender, STEP/STL/DXF/SVG/PDF exports, print-fit compensation, versioned artifacts, and old STEP reference measurements.
Launch, control, debug, and clean up remote Linux GUI apps through clean Xvfb desktops, localhost x11vnc/noVNC bridges, browser app windows, SSH-local ports, and camera/GUI process isolation.
Diagnose, privately back up, compact, verify, and hand off stalled or extremely slow Codex sessions through guarded official app-server workflows without rewriting rollout JSONL or SQLite state.
